a-headcount-total.label: Total IEs ever signed
a-headcount-total.author: Angelus
a-headcount-total.rationale: All-time count of IEs who have ever signed with Whitewater Reinventions. Used for insurance and compliance reporting, not subscription billing.
a-headcount-total.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026 â€” tab Summary, cell IE Total

a-headcount-board.label: IE headcount â€” board view
a-headcount-board.author: Angelus
a-headcount-board.rationale: The board-facing IE headcount figure. Agreed in operations meeting for board pack presentation. Excludes IEs on hold, inactive, or pre-contract. This is not the billing number â€” see org.ie.headcount.active_billing.
a-headcount-board.source: Operations meeting May 2026, confirmed by Niel Malan

a-headcount-billing.label: IE headcount â€” active billing
a-headcount-billing.author: Angelus
a-headcount-billing.rationale: IEs currently on active subscription billing. Used for M365, HubSpot Core, and Miro seat attribution calculations. Differs from board view (60) and total ever signed (106).
a-headcount-billing.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026 â€” active licence count reconciled against Xero April 2026

a-m365-basic-unit-cost.label: M365 Business Basic â€” unit cost per seat per month
a-m365-basic-unit-cost.author: Angelus
a-m365-basic-unit-cost.rationale: Current Microsoft billing rate for Business Basic tier, billed in AUD direct via Microsoft AU. Confirmed against April 2026 Xero entries.
a-m365-basic-unit-cost.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026

a-m365-standard-unit-cost.label: M365 Business Standard â€” unit cost per seat per month
a-m365-standard-unit-cost.author: Angelus
a-m365-standard-unit-cost.rationale: Current Microsoft billing rate for Business Standard tier, billed in AUD direct. Confirmed against April 2026 Xero entries.
a-m365-standard-unit-cost.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026

a-m365-attribution.label: M365 Basic â€” attribution rate per cohort IE
a-m365-attribution.author: Angelus
a-m365-attribution.rationale: 100% of IEs receive a Business Basic seat. Baseline scenario. IEs with elevated access (managers, internal staff) are on Business Standard and counted separately.
a-m365-attribution.source: Operations meeting May 2026 â€” confirmed by Niel

a-hubspot-bundle-cost.label: HubSpot bundle â€” current annual cost (AUD)
a-hubspot-bundle-cost.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-bundle-cost.rationale: HubSpot billed directly in AUD â€” no USD/FX conversion. Current bundle includes Sales Hub Pro seats plus Core add-on seats. Confirmed against Xero April 2026 entry of AUD 918/month (AUD 11,016 annualised).
a-hubspot-bundle-cost.source: Xero April 2026 â€” HubSpot entry AUD 918; WWRI Cost Matrix Excel tab HubSpot

a-hubspot-bundle-monthly.label: HubSpot bundle â€” current monthly cost (AUD)
a-hubspot-bundle-monthly.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-bundle-monthly.rationale: Current 50% discounted bundle rate, locked through 31 October 2026. Confirmed against Xero April 2026 entry. Comprises 5 Hub seats + 7 standalone Core Seats (12 total) at 50% off list price of AUD 1,836/mo.
a-hubspot-bundle-monthly.source: Xero April 2026 â€” AUD 918 HubSpot entry; HubSpot AUD-localised quote May 2026

a-hubspot-renewal-start.label: HubSpot bundle â€” renewal start month
a-hubspot-renewal-start.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-renewal-start.rationale: Current contract expires 31 October 2026. Renewal pricing applies from November 2026. Subject to renegotiation in October 2026.
a-hubspot-renewal-start.source: HubSpot contract renewal date â€” confirmed with Niel May 2026

a-hubspot-renewal-monthly.label: HubSpot bundle â€” renewal monthly cost at Architecture F (AUD)
a-hubspot-renewal-monthly.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-renewal-monthly.rationale: Architecture F (status quo bundle) at 40% renewal discount from November 2026. List price AUD 1,836/mo Ã— 0.60 = AUD 1,101.60. Subject to renegotiation â€” Architectures 1/2/3 modelled in Epic 4.
a-hubspot-renewal-monthly.source: HubSpot AUD-localised renewal quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hubspot-cohort-addition-start.label: HubSpot cohort seats â€” first addition month
a-hubspot-cohort-addition-start.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-cohort-addition-start.rationale: HubSpot adoption lags M365 by approximately 3 months. CH18 joins M365 in Sep 2026 but doesn't require HubSpot until Dec 2026 once actively engaged with clients.
a-hubspot-cohort-addition-start.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3; agreed with Niel 11 May 2026

a-hubspot-per-seat-rate.label: HubSpot Core Seat â€” per-seat rate after renewal discount (AUD/mo)
a-hubspot-per-seat-rate.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-per-seat-rate.rationale: Architecture F: Professional Core Seat list price AUD 80/mo Ã— 0.60 (40% renewal discount) = AUD 48/seat/month. Applies to cohort additions from December 2026.
a-hubspot-per-seat-rate.source: HubSpot AUD-localised renewal quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§4

a-hubspot-base-seats.label: HubSpot bundle â€” base Core Seat count
a-hubspot-base-seats.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-base-seats.rationale: Bundle includes 5 embedded seats (one per Hub: Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Data) plus 7 standalone Core Seat add-ons = 12 total. Used for Licence Forecast view display.
a-hubspot-base-seats.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§1; HubSpot AUD-localised account view May 2026

a-hs-cohort-timing-ch18.label: HubSpot CH18 â€” seat activation month
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch18.author: Angelus
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch18.rationale: CH18 graduates M365 in Sep 2026. HubSpot adoption lags ~3 months; seats activated Dec 2026 once IEs are actively engaging clients.
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch18.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.1; agreed with Niel 11 May 2026

a-hs-cohort-timing-ch19.label: HubSpot CH19 â€” seat activation month
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch19.author: Angelus
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch19.rationale: CH19 graduates M365 in Oct 2026. HubSpot seats activated Jan 2027 (~3 month lag).
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch19.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.1; agreed with Niel 11 May 2026

a-hs-cohort-timing-ch20.label: HubSpot CH20 â€” seat activation month
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch20.author: Angelus
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch20.rationale: CH20 graduates M365 in Feb 2027. HubSpot seats activated May 2027 (~3 month lag). CH21 and CH22 fall outside the FY 26/27 modelling window.
a-hs-cohort-timing-ch20.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.1; agreed with Niel 11 May 2026

a-hs-seats-primary-target.label: Primary target â€” HubSpot seats per cohort
a-hs-seats-primary-target.author: Angelus
a-hs-seats-primary-target.rationale: Approximately 50% of each 12-IE cohort actively uses HubSpot at steady state (~6 IEs, rounded to 5 for conservative seat allocation). Reflects seat reallocation as inactive IEs free up seats for new ones.
a-hs-seats-primary-target.source: Agreed between Angelus and Niel, 11 May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.2

a-hs-seats-minimum-viable.label: Minimum viable â€” HubSpot seats per cohort
a-hs-seats-minimum-viable.author: Angelus
a-hs-seats-minimum-viable.rationale: Conservative allocation for minimum viable scenario â€” 3 seats per cohort assuming lower HubSpot adoption rate in a smaller intake cohort.
a-hs-seats-minimum-viable.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.2

a-hs-seats-optimal-maximum.label: Optimal maximum â€” HubSpot seats per cohort
a-hs-seats-optimal-maximum.author: Angelus
a-hs-seats-optimal-maximum.rationale: Upside allocation for optimal maximum scenario â€” 8 seats per cohort assuming higher HubSpot adoption in a larger, more client-active intake cohort.
a-hs-seats-optimal-maximum.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§3.2

a-hubspot-core-attribution.label: HubSpot Core seats â€” attribution rate per active billing IE
a-hubspot-core-attribution.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-core-attribution.rationale: Approximately 50% of active billing IEs use a HubSpot Core seat for client-facing CRM activities. Remaining IEs do not require CRM access. Used as the primary target attribution rate.
a-hubspot-core-attribution.source: Operations meeting May 2026 â€” Niel estimate, confirmed as primary target

a-miro-unit-cost.label: Miro Business Plan â€” unit cost per seat per month
a-miro-unit-cost.author: Angelus
a-miro-unit-cost.rationale: Miro billed in USD. Current Business Plan rate. FX conversion applied via scenario.fx_rate.aud_usd assumption.
a-miro-unit-cost.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026

a-miro-attribution.label: Miro â€” attribution rate per active billing IE
a-miro-attribution.author: Angelus
a-miro-attribution.rationale: Operations meeting 2026-05-20 â€” Niel confirmed all new IEs should have Miro access (100% attribution)

a-fx-aud-usd.label: FX rate â€” AUD/USD
a-fx-aud-usd.author: Angelus
a-fx-aud-usd.rationale: Working exchange rate for USD-billed subscriptions (Miro, Gnowbe, Claude Max, ChatGPT, LinkedIn Recruiter Lite). Updated manually each quarter from RBA average.

a-fx-aud-eur.label: FX rate â€” AUD/EUR
a-fx-aud-eur.author: Angelus
a-fx-aud-eur.rationale: Working exchange rate for EUR-billed subscriptions. Indicative placeholder â€” no EUR-billed subscriptions currently in inventory. Updated manually each quarter from RBA average when needed.
a-fx-aud-eur.source: RBA exchange rate data, May 2026 â€” indicative

a-fx-aud-gbp.label: FX rate â€” AUD/GBP
a-fx-aud-gbp.author: Angelus
a-fx-aud-gbp.rationale: Working exchange rate for GBP-billed subscriptions. Indicative placeholder â€” no GBP-billed subscriptions currently in inventory. Updated manually each quarter from RBA average when needed.
a-fx-aud-gbp.source: RBA exchange rate data, May 2026 â€” indicative

a-scenario-pt-ies-per-cohort.label: Primary target â€” IEs per cohort
a-scenario-pt-ies-per-cohort.author: Angelus
a-scenario-pt-ies-per-cohort.rationale: Primary target / standard technology subscriptions: 10 IEs per cohort. Locked in subscription costing review 11 May 2026.

a-m365-basic-baseline-seats.label: M365 Business Basic â€” current baseline seat count (pre-cohort)
a-m365-basic-baseline-seats.author: Angelus
a-m365-basic-baseline-seats.rationale: Current Business Basic seats assigned per the Microsoft Admin Center as of 11 May 2026 (Kane confirmed: 42 assigned, 8 available). Cohort intake from CH17 onwards is added on top of this baseline.
a-m365-basic-baseline-seats.source: Microsoft Admin Center, confirmed by Kane Salzer 11 May 2026 (Operations meeting)

a-miro-baseline-seats.label: Miro â€” current baseline seat count (pre-cohort)
a-miro-baseline-seats.author: Angelus
a-miro-baseline-seats.rationale: Current Miro licences as of May 2026 â€” 22 seats. Low IE utilisation noted in subscription alignment meeting. Cohort intake from CH17 onwards is added on top of this baseline at the Miro attribution rate.

a-m365-standard-seats.label: M365 Business Standard â€” fixed seat count
a-m365-standard-seats.author: Angelus
a-m365-standard-seats.rationale: Five named users on Business Standard: Angelus Morningstar, Niel Malan, Kane Bhana, Bernard Leung, and one finance reviewer. These are internal admin and leadership roles requiring the full suite (Teams, OneDrive 1TB, Bookings). All other IEs are on Business Basic.
a-m365-standard-seats.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026 â€” Microsoft licence tab

a-cohort-timing-ch17.label: CH17 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch17.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch17.rationale: Cohort 17 commences engagement and subscription billing in June 2026. This cohort is in FY 25/26. Subsequent cohorts drive FY 26/27 growth.
a-cohort-timing-ch17.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-cohort-timing-ch18.label: CH18 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch18.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch18.rationale: Cohort 18 commences September 2026 â€” first cohort of FY 26/27.
a-cohort-timing-ch18.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-cohort-timing-ch19.label: CH19 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch19.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch19.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-cohort-timing-ch20.label: CH20 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch20.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch20.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-cohort-timing-ch21.label: CH21 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch21.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch21.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-cohort-timing-ch22.label: CH22 cohort â€” billing start month
a-cohort-timing-ch22.author: Angelus
a-cohort-timing-ch22.rationale: Cohort 22 commences June 2027 â€” final cohort of FY 26/27.
a-cohort-timing-ch22.source: WWRI recruitment calendar, May 2026 planning session

a-scenario-mv-ies-per-cohort.label: Minimum viable â€” IEs per cohort
a-scenario-mv-ies-per-cohort.author: Angelus
a-scenario-mv-ies-per-cohort.rationale: Minimum viable / baseline technology subscriptions: 5 IEs per cohort. Locked in subscription costing review 11 May 2026.

a-scenario-om-ies-per-cohort.label: Optimal maximum â€” IEs per cohort
a-scenario-om-ies-per-cohort.author: Angelus
a-scenario-om-ies-per-cohort.rationale: Optimal / premium technology subscriptions: 15 IEs per cohort. Locked in subscription costing review 11 May 2026.

a-scenario-mv-num-cohorts.label: Minimum viable â€” cohorts in FY 26/27
a-scenario-mv-num-cohorts.author: Angelus
a-scenario-mv-num-cohorts.rationale: Minimum viable scenario assumes 4 cohort intakes in FY 26/27 (CH18â€“CH21), reflecting a conservative recruitment pace. CH22 (Jun 2027) is deferred in this scenario.
a-scenario-mv-num-cohorts.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026 â€” scenario planning tab

a-scenario-pt-num-cohorts.label: Primary target â€” cohorts in FY 26/27
a-scenario-pt-num-cohorts.author: Angelus
a-scenario-pt-num-cohorts.rationale: Primary target assumes all 5 planned cohort intakes in FY 26/27 proceed on schedule (CH18â€“CH22). Agreed as baseline for board reporting.

a-scenario-om-num-cohorts.label: Optimal maximum â€” cohorts in FY 26/27
a-scenario-om-num-cohorts.author: Angelus
a-scenario-om-num-cohorts.rationale: Optimal maximum also uses 5 cohort intakes in FY 26/27 â€” the lever for this scenario is IEs per cohort (16), not cohort frequency.
a-scenario-om-num-cohorts.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026

a-hubspot-discount-rate.label: HubSpot renewal discount rate
a-hubspot-discount-rate.author: Angelus
a-hubspot-discount-rate.rationale: 40% renewal discount is the default negotiation baseline for the October 2026 HubSpot renewal. Architecture F renewal monthly (AUD 1,101.60) was calculated at this rate from list AUD 1,836. Adjust in the HubSpot architecture view during negotiation modelling.
a-hubspot-discount-rate.source: HubSpot AUD-localised renewal quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-f-bundle-list-monthly.label: HubSpot Arch F â€” bundle list price (AUD/mo, before discount)
a-hs-arch-f-bundle-list-monthly.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-f-bundle-list-monthly.rationale: Architecture F (status quo bundle) full list price before any renewal discount. 5 Hub embedded seats + 7 Pro Core Seats. Current monthly (AUD 918) is at 50% off this list; renewal at 40% off gives AUD 1,101.60.
a-hs-arch-f-bundle-list-monthly.source: HubSpot AUD-localised account view and quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§1

a-hs-arch-f-core-seat-list.label: HubSpot Arch F â€” Pro Core Seat list price (AUD/seat/mo)
a-hs-arch-f-core-seat-list.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-f-core-seat-list.rationale: Pro Core Seat list price at AUD 80/seat/mo. Applies to cohort additions under Architecture F. Renewal discount reduces this to AUD 48/seat/mo at 40%.
a-hs-arch-f-core-seat-list.source: HubSpot AUD-localised renewal quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§4

a-hs-arch-f-base-seat-count.label: HubSpot Arch F â€” total base seat count
a-hs-arch-f-base-seat-count.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-f-base-seat-count.rationale: Architecture F bundle: 5 embedded Hub seats (one per Hub product) plus 7 standalone Pro Core Seat add-ons = 12 total. Mirrors existing subscription.hubspot.base_seats assumption.
a-hs-arch-f-base-seat-count.source: HubSpot AUD-localised account view May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§1

a-hs-arch-1-seat-list.label: HubSpot Arch 1 â€” Sales Hub Starter Core Seat list price (AUD/seat/mo)
a-hs-arch-1-seat-list.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-1-seat-list.rationale: Architecture 1 (Sales Hub Starter only): seven Sales Hub Starter Core Seats at AUD 20/seat/mo list price. Starter tier gives basic CRM, contacts, deals, and email tools â€” sufficient for field IEs not running complex pipeline analytics.
a-hs-arch-1-seat-list.source: HubSpot AUD-localised pricing page May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-1-base-seat-count.label: HubSpot Arch 1 â€” base Sales Hub Starter seat count
a-hs-arch-1-base-seat-count.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-1-base-seat-count.rationale: Architecture 1 base bundle: 7 Sales Hub Starter Core Seats, matching the 7 standalone seats in Architecture F. Cohort additions are added on top of this base.
a-hs-arch-1-base-seat-count.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-list.label: HubSpot Arch 2 â€” Sales Pro Seat list price (AUD/seat/mo)
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-list.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-list.rationale: Architecture 2 (Mixed Pro and Core): 1 Sales Pro Seat at AUD 100/seat/mo list. This is the premium analytics/reporting seat for the account owner. Renewal discount applies.
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-list.source: HubSpot AUD-localised pricing page May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-list.label: HubSpot Arch 2 â€” Pro Core Seat list price (AUD/seat/mo)
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-list.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-list.rationale: Architecture 2 (Mixed Pro and Core): 6 Pro Core Seats at AUD 50/seat/mo list. Pro Core Seats give access to Pro features without the full Sales Pro analytics suite. Renewal discount applies.
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-list.source: HubSpot AUD-localised pricing page May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-count.label: HubSpot Arch 2 â€” Sales Pro Seat count
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-count.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-count.rationale: Architecture 2 base: 1 Sales Pro Seat for the account owner/analytics user (Angelus or designated manager). Cohort additions use Pro Core Seats at AUD 50/seat/mo.
a-hs-arch-2-pro-seat-count.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-count.label: HubSpot Arch 2 â€” Pro Core Seat count
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-count.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-count.rationale: Architecture 2 base: 6 Pro Core Seats for active IEs requiring CRM access beyond the account owner. Together with 1 Pro Seat = 7 total seats, matching Architecture F's 7 standalone seats.
a-hs-arch-2-core-seat-count.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-list.label: HubSpot Arch 3 â€” Sales Pro Seat list price (AUD/seat/mo)
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-list.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-list.rationale: Architecture 3 (Full Sales Hub Pro): all seats are Sales Pro at AUD 100/seat/mo list. Maximum capability tier â€” full analytics, sequences, forecasting, and pipeline reporting for all users. Renewal discount applies.
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-list.source: HubSpot AUD-localised pricing page May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-count.label: HubSpot Arch 3 â€” Sales Pro Seat count
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-count.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-count.rationale: Architecture 3 base: 7 Sales Pro Seats, matching Architecture F's 7 standalone seat count. All seats at full Pro tier. Cohort additions also at Sales Pro rate.
a-hs-arch-3-pro-seat-count.source: WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-hs-arch-onboarding-fee.label: HubSpot Sales Hub Pro â€” one-off onboarding fee (AUD)
a-hs-arch-onboarding-fee.author: Angelus
a-hs-arch-onboarding-fee.rationale: Architectures 2 and 3 (both involving Sales Hub Pro seats) attract a one-off Sales Hub Pro onboarding fee of AUD 1,500 in Year 1. Architectures F and 1 do not incur this fee. May be waived in negotiation â€” track against rationale if waived.
a-hs-arch-onboarding-fee.source: HubSpot AUD-localised renewal quote May 2026; WWRI HubSpot Subscription Model spec Â§2

a-forecast-target-fy26.label: Recruitment forecast â€” FY26 active IEs (actual baseline)
a-forecast-target-fy26.author: Angelus
a-forecast-target-fy26.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. FY26 actuals â€” 22 active IEs at FY-end. Read-only baseline; not subject to variance.

a-forecast-target-fy27.label: Recruitment forecast â€” FY27 active IEs target
a-forecast-target-fy27.author: Angelus
a-forecast-target-fy27.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. FY27 (Jul 26 â€“ Jun 27) target: 60 active IEs at FY-end.

a-forecast-target-fy28.label: Recruitment forecast â€” FY28 active IEs target
a-forecast-target-fy28.author: Angelus
a-forecast-target-fy28.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. FY28 (Jul 27 â€“ Jun 28) target: 99 active IEs at FY-end.

a-forecast-target-fy29.label: Recruitment forecast â€” FY29 active IEs target
a-forecast-target-fy29.author: Angelus
a-forecast-target-fy29.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. FY29 (Jul 28 â€“ Jun 29) target: 150 active IEs at FY-end.

a-forecast-weight-apac.label: Recruitment forecast â€” APAC regional weight
a-forecast-weight-apac.author: Angelus
a-forecast-weight-apac.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. Equal three-way regional split as starting assumption. Adjust in Scenarios panel.

a-forecast-weight-americas.label: Recruitment forecast â€” Americas regional weight
a-forecast-weight-americas.author: Angelus
a-forecast-weight-americas.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. Equal three-way regional split as starting assumption. Adjust in Scenarios panel.

a-forecast-weight-emea.label: Recruitment forecast â€” EMEA regional weight
a-forecast-weight-emea.author: Angelus
a-forecast-weight-emea.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. EMEA is 0.334 to ensure the three weights sum to exactly 1.000.

a-forecast-attrition-apac.label: Recruitment forecast â€” APAC annual attrition rate
a-forecast-attrition-apac.author: Angelus
a-forecast-attrition-apac.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 10% annual attrition assumed across all regions as baseline.

a-forecast-attrition-americas.label: Recruitment forecast â€” Americas annual attrition rate
a-forecast-attrition-americas.author: Angelus
a-forecast-attrition-americas.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 10% annual attrition assumed across all regions as baseline.

a-forecast-attrition-emea.label: Recruitment forecast â€” EMEA annual attrition rate
a-forecast-attrition-emea.author: Angelus
a-forecast-attrition-emea.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 10% annual attrition assumed across all regions as baseline.

a-forecast-vet-to-short.label: Recruitment forecast â€” Vetted to Shortlist conversion rate
a-forecast-vet-to-short.author: Angelus
a-forecast-vet-to-short.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 40% of vetted/longlisted candidates are shortlisted. Used in backward pipeline calculation.

a-forecast-short-to-onboard.label: Recruitment forecast â€” Shortlist to Onboarded conversion rate
a-forecast-short-to-onboard.author: Angelus
a-forecast-short-to-onboard.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 50% of shortlisted candidates are onboarded. Used in backward pipeline calculation.

a-forecast-cohorts-per-year.label: Recruitment forecast â€” cohort intakes per financial year
a-forecast-cohorts-per-year.author: Angelus
a-forecast-cohorts-per-year.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. 5 cohort intakes per FY. Used for sanity check (avg onboards per cohort target band: 10â€“15).

a-forecast-variance-min.label: Recruitment forecast â€” minimum viable variance factor
a-forecast-variance-min.author: Angelus
a-forecast-variance-min.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. âˆ’20% variance applied to base forecast for the Minimum Viable scenario.

a-forecast-variance-max.label: Recruitment forecast â€” optimal maximum variance factor
a-forecast-variance-max.author: Angelus
a-forecast-variance-max.rationale: IE Recruitment Forecast v002, May 2026. +20% variance applied to base forecast for the Optimal Maximum scenario.

a-linkedin-recruiter-unit-cost.label: LinkedIn Recruiter Lite â€” monthly cost
a-linkedin-recruiter-unit-cost.author: Angelus
a-linkedin-recruiter-unit-cost.rationale: LinkedIn Recruiter Lite billed monthly in USD. Used by Kane Salzer for IE candidate sourcing.
a-linkedin-recruiter-unit-cost.source: WWRI Subscription Cost Matrix Excel, May 2026

a-claude-max-unit-cost.label: Claude Max 20x Plan â€” monthly cost

sub-hubspot-bundle.note: Fixed bundle cost. Phase 1 (Julâ€“Oct 2026): AUD 918/mo. Phase 2 (Nov 2026+): AUD 1,101.60/mo. No cohort component.

sub-hubspot-cohort.note: Per-seat cohort additions only. Starts Dec 2026. Cost = perSeatRate x cohortCount x seatsPerCohort. Handled as special case in compute.js.

sub-claude-cohort.note: Premium IE cohort subscription. Attribution currently 0% â€” not yet agreed. Placeholder for future decision.

sub-m365-standard-cohort.note: IE cohort Standard tier. Attribution Pending â€” set to fraction of IEs who need full suite over Basic.

sub-copilot-cohort.note: IE cohort Copilot add-on. Attribution Pending â€” not yet agreed.
